item.title: Circle receives final OCC approval for national trust bank charter, shifting $73B USDC into federal oversight framework
OCC public comment window on GENIUS Act AML and sanctions rules for stablecoin issuers closes July 24
SEC set to propose "Regulation Crypto" rule this month creating temporary registration exemptions for select token offerings
Ripple secures full MiCA CASP authorization from Luxembourg, gaining EU-wide crypto-payments license across 30 EEA countries
UK government launches tokenization taskforce with 54 firms including BlackRock, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan and Morgan Stanley
Tether USDT enters two-year countdown under GENIUS Act to achieve compliance or face removal from U.S. crypto platforms
CFTC closes public comment July 27 on 24/7 trading and perpetual bitcoin futures, three months after first regulated launch on Kalshi
Augustus raises $180M at $1B valuation for OCC-approved stablecoin clearing bank built for AI-era payments
U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs record five consecutive sessions of net inflows totaling more than $600M, reversing eight-week outflow streak
Visa, Mastercard and Ripple back x402 Foundation to standardize stablecoin payments between AI agents over HTTP
JPMorgan Kinexys and Mastercard Multi-Token Network link blockchain cross-border payments; Kinexys reports $2B daily transaction volume
Digital Asset Market Clarity Act passage odds reach 43% on Polymarket after reports Trump accepted crypto ethics provision
Ostium DeFi protocol loses $18M to oracle attack using manipulated future-timestamp price reports to trigger false vault payouts
